home.description: Read AI-generated manga, earn XP, join clans and become a Manga Legend.
home.ctaCreatorDesc: Publish your manga, earn InkCoins and build your audience.
home.newsPageDesc: Stay up to date with the latest news, platform updates, and community events from MangaAura.
home.newsClanSeasonDesc: Gather your guild and prepare for the new battle for InkCoins. New rewards added to the pool.
home.newsReaderModeDesc: Based on your feedback, we've refined the page-by-page reading system for lower RAM usage on mobile.
home.newsAIArtistsDesc: Powerful new generation and editing tools for creators. Take your manga to the next level.
home.newsMobileAppDesc: Closed beta of MangaAura for iOS and Android is now available. Optimized mobile experience.
home.newsContestDesc: Join our monthly manga contest and win InkCoins, exposure, and exclusive badges.
home.newsClanSeasonBody: Clan Season 3 has officially launched! Gather your guild members and prepare for epic battles. This season brings new InkCoins rewards, exclusive badges, and a revamped matchmaking system. Complete daily missions, climb the leaderboard, and prove your clan's worth. New rewards have been added to the prize pool including rare avatar frames and limited-time cosmetics. The season runs until August 15th, so start earning those points now!
home.newsReaderModeBody: Based on your valuable feedback, we've completely overhauled our page-by-page reading system. The new Paged Reader Mode consumes significantly less RAM on mobile devices, delivers faster page transitions, and includes a customizable reading experience. You can now adjust brightness, background color, and font size to your preference. Vertical scrolling and horizontal paging are both supported. Try it out on any manga and let us know what you think!
home.newsAIArtistsBody: We're excited to announce a major update to our AI creation tools. The new suite includes enhanced character generation with better consistency, improved background scene creation, and an advanced inpainting tool for fine-tuning your panels. Our AI now better understands manga art styles and can assist with screentone patterns, speed lines, and effect backgrounds. These tools are available to all creators on MangaAura. Upgrade your workflow and bring your stories to life!
home.newsMobileAppBody: The closed beta for our mobile app is now available for iOS and Android users! Experience MangaAura optimized for your phone with a native interface, smooth scrolling, and offline reading support. The beta includes access to your library, the reader, and community features. To join the beta, check your inbox for an invitation or sign up on the waitlist. We're looking forward to your feedback to make the mobile experience even better before the public release.
home.newsContestBody: Our monthly manga contest is back with bigger prizes than ever! This month's theme is 'Parallel Worlds' — create a one-shot manga exploring alternate dimensions. The winner receives 5000 InkCoins, a featured spot on the homepage, an exclusive 'Contest Winner' badge, and direct feedback from our editorial team. Submissions are open until the end of the month. All genres and styles are welcome. Let your imagination run wild!
home.newsReadingStatsDesc: Track your reading habits, set goals, and discover your most-read genres with our new personalized statistics dashboard.
home.newsReadingStatsBody:
We're excited to introduce the Reading Stats Dashboard — your personal reading companion! Now you can track every chapter you read, visualize your reading habits over time, and discover fascinating insights about your manga journey.

The dashboard displays your total chapters read, reading streaks, favorite genres, and hourly reading patterns. Set weekly reading goals and earn badges for hitting milestones. Compare your stats with friends and see who's the most dedicated reader in your clan.

Access your dashboard from your profile page or by clicking the new 'Stats' button in the reader. Your data is private by default, but you can choose to share selected stats with your clan or followers. Start tracking today and see how deep your manga addiction runs!
home.newsCreatorSpotlightDesc: Meet the creators who have captured the community's heart this month with their exceptional stories and art.
home.newsCreatorSpotlightBody:
Every month we shine a light on the talented creators who make MangaAura special. This May, we're featuring three rising stars whose work has garnered exceptional engagement from the community.

First up is SakuraManga with 'Whispers of the Moon' — a hauntingly beautiful romance set in feudal Japan that has readers hooked with its intricate panelling and emotional depth. With over 50,000 reads in its first month, this series is one to watch.

Next, we have PixelNinja whose action epic 'Neon Dragons' blends cyberpunk aesthetics with classic martial arts storytelling. The dynamic fight choreography and vibrant color palette have earned it a dedicated fanbase that grows daily.

Finally, meet ArtWanderer, a creator who joined MangaAura just three months ago and has already published 4 complete chapters of 'The Clockwork Garden,' a steampunk fantasy adventure with gorgeous line art and a richly imagined world.

Congratulations to all our featured creators! Want to be featured next month? Keep creating, engaging with your readers, and pushing the boundaries of your art.
home.newsDeveloperAPIDesc: Build integrations, create bots, and extend MangaAura with our official REST API now in open beta for all verified creators.
home.newsDeveloperAPIBody:
We're thrilled to announce the open beta of the MangaAura Developer API — your gateway to building custom integrations and extending the platform's capabilities.

The API provides programmatic access to manga metadata, chapter listings, user profiles (with consent), and community features. Build a Discord bot that notifies your server about new chapter releases, create a reading tracker widget for your personal website, or develop a third-party client with your own reading interface.

API keys are available to all verified creators through the Developer Settings page. We provide comprehensive documentation with code examples in JavaScript, Python, and curl. Each key comes with generous rate limits and detailed usage analytics.

We're actively iterating on the API based on developer feedback, so join our Developer Discord channel to share your use cases and suggestions. The API is free during beta, with pricing tiers to be announced at full launch.
home.newsUIRefreshDesc: A polished, faster, and more consistent visual experience across the entire platform — here's what changed and why.
home.newsUIRefreshBody:
You may have noticed things look a bit different! We've rolled out a comprehensive UI refresh across MangaAura to make the platform more intuitive, visually cohesive, and performant.

The refresh includes updated typography with better readability, refined color palettes for improved contrast and accessibility, smoother transitions and micro-interactions, and a redesigned navigation system that surfaces your most-used features faster.

We standardized card components across the site for visual consistency, reduced visual clutter in the reader interface, and added subtle animations that make browsing feel more responsive. The mobile experience has also been significantly improved with larger touch targets and optimized layouts.

This update is the result of months of user feedback and usability testing. We'll continue to refine based on your input — drop us a line through the feedback form if you spot anything that could be improved!
home.newsPerformanceDesc: Page loads are now 40% faster, data usage reduced by 60% on mobile, and server response times cut in half.
home.newsPerformanceBody:
Performance has always been a top priority, and we're proud to announce our biggest infrastructure update yet. Over the past month, our engineering team has been hard at work optimizing every layer of the stack.

Key improvements include: a complete rewrite of our image delivery pipeline with next-gen formats and intelligent compression, implementation of edge caching across our global CDN that serves 80% of requests from cache, database query optimization that reduced average page load times by 40%, and a new lazy-loading strategy for the reader that cuts initial data transfer by 60%.

Mobile users will notice the biggest difference — pages load in under 2 seconds even on slower connections, and the reader consumes significantly less bandwidth per chapter. We've also reduced our server response times by over 50%, making the entire platform feel snappier.

These improvements are live now across all regions. Let us know how the new performance feels for you!
home.newsSummerEventDesc: Join the Summer Reading Festival with exclusive badges, double XP weekends, and a grand prize of 10,000 InkCoins!
home.newsSummerEventBody:
Summer is here and so is our biggest community event of the year — the MangaAura Summer Reading Festival! From June 1st to August 31st, readers and creators alike can participate in a season-long celebration of manga.

What's in store? Double XP weekends every month, exclusive Summer Festival badges for participants who complete the reading challenges, daily login rewards including free InkCoins and cosmetic items, and a grand prize of 10,000 InkCoins awarded to the reader with the most chapters completed by the end of summer.

Creators aren't left out either — we're hosting a 'Summer Special' one-shot contest with separate prizes. Publish a summer-themed chapter between June and August and you could win 5,000 InkCoins plus a permanent featured spot on the homepage.

The festival also features weekly community events, creator Q&A sessions, and collaborative reading parties. Check the Events page for the full calendar and start your summer reading journey today! Screenshot your reading stats and share with #MangaAuraSummer for a chance to be featured on our social media.

help.title: Help Center
help.description: Find answers to your most frequent questions
help.notFound: Didn't find what you were looking for?
help.notFoundDesc: Our support team is available to help you

whatIsMangaAura.a: MangaAura is a platform to discover, read and share manga. We offer an extensive manga library with online reading, achievement system, active community and creator tools.

isItFree.a: Yes, most content is free. Some premium manga or exclusive features may require a subscription or Ink Coins, our virtual currency.

howToCreateAccount.q: How do I create an account?
howToCreateAccount.a: Click 'Sign Up' in the top right corner. You can register with email, Google or GitHub. You only need a username and email address.

saveProgress.q: How do I save my reading progress?
saveProgress.a: Your progress is automatically saved when you're logged in. Just click the read button and the system will remember where you left off.

offline.a: Offline reading is not currently available, but it's a planned feature for future updates.

changeMode.q: How do I change reading mode?
changeMode.a: In the reader, use the settings menu (gear icon) to switch between single page, double page or continuous scroll reading.

followUsers.q: How do I follow other users?
followUsers.a: Visit the user's profile and click the "Follow" button. You'll receive notifications when they publish content or interact with you.

howClansWork.a: Clans are community groups organized by interests. You can join an existing clan or create your own to connect with other readers.

reportContent.q: How do I report inappropriate content?
reportContent.a: Use the report button that appears on each piece of content (manga, comment, profile) or visit our reports page to submit a detailed report.

publishManga.q: How do I publish my manga on MangaAura?
publishManga.a: Go to "Creator Dashboard" from your profile menu and click "Publish manga". You can upload chapters, add covers and manage your entire work.

monetize.a: Yes, through our sponsorship system and Ink Coins. Readers can support you directly and you receive a share of the revenue.

formats.a: We accept JPG, PNG and WebP. We recommend images at least 1200px wide for optimal reading quality.

recoverPassword.q: How do I recover my password?
recoverPassword.a: On the login page, click "Forgot your password?" and follow the instructions. You'll receive an email to reset it.

whatAreInkCoins.a: They're MangaAura's virtual currency. You can use them to unlock premium chapters, support creators and buy special features.

deleteAccount.q: How do I delete my account?
deleteAccount.a: Go to Settings > Account and select "Delete account". Note that this action is irreversible and you will lose all your data.

dataProtection.q: How do you protect my data?
dataProtection.a: We use SSL encryption, secure authentication and comply with privacy regulations. You can review our privacy policy for more details.

blockUser.q: How do I block a user?
blockUser.a: Visit the user's profile, click the three dots and select "Block". They won't be able to message or interact with you.

harassment.a: Report the user immediately using the report function. Our moderation team will review the case within 24 hours. You can also block the user in the meantime.

dmca.title: DMCA Policy
dmca.description: Procedure to report content that infringes copyright
dmca.importantDesc: MangaAura respects intellectual property rights. If you believe your work has been copied in a way that constitutes copyright infringement, follow the procedure described below.
dmca.processDesc: To file a valid copyright infringement claim, follow these steps:
dmca.step1Desc: Locate the exact URL of the content you believe infringes your copyright.
dmca.step2Desc: Include your contact information, description of the protected work, and good faith statement.
dmca.step3Desc: Send the notification to our designated DMCA agent.
dmca.step4Desc: We will review your report and take action within 48-72 business hours.
dmca.requirementsDesc: Your DMCA notification must include the following information:
dmca.req1: Physical or electronic signature of the copyright owner
dmca.req2: Identification of the copyrighted work claimed to be infringed
dmca.req3: Identification of the allegedly infringing material and its location
dmca.req5: Good faith statement that the use is not authorized
dmca.req6: Statement that the information is accurate under penalty of perjury
dmca.agentDesc: Send your copyright infringement notifications to:
dmca.counterNoticeDesc: If you believe your content was removed by mistake or that you have the right to use the material, you may submit a counter-notification that must include:
dmca.counter2: Identification of the removed material and its previous location
dmca.counter3: Statement under penalty of perjury that you have a good faith belief the material was removed by mistake
dmca.counter4: Your contact information and consent to federal jurisdiction
dmca.repeatInfringersDesc: MangaAura has a strict policy against repeat infringers. Accounts of users who receive multiple valid DMCA notifications will be suspended or terminated.
dmca.needHelpDesc: If you have questions about the DMCA process or need assistance, contact our support team.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How MangaAura collects, uses, and protects your personal information
privacy.infoCollectDesc: At MangaAura, we take your privacy very seriously. We only collect the information necessary to provide and improve our services.
privacy.use1: Provide and maintain the manga reading and publishing service
privacy.use2: Personalize your experience and content recommendations
privacy.use4: Communicate with you about updates and support
privacy.use5: Prevent fraud and ensure platform security
privacy.accessDesc: You can request a copy of your personal data at any time.
privacy.rectificationDesc: You can update your profile information from your account settings.
privacy.deletionDesc: You can permanently delete your account and all associated data.
privacy.portabilityDesc: You can export your data in JSON format from your user dashboard.
privacy.dataSecurityDesc: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your data:
privacy.retentionDesc: We retain your data while you maintain an active account. If you delete your account, your personal data will be permanently deleted within 30 days, except where required by law.
privacy.contactDesc: If you have questions about this privacy policy or wish to exercise your rights, contact us:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Terms and conditions of use for MangaAura
terms.intro: Welcome to MangaAura. Please read these terms carefully before using our platform.
terms.section1Content: By accessing and using MangaAura, you agree to be legally bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use our platform.
terms.section2Content:
MangaAura is a web manga reading and publishing platform. We offer:
      • Access to web manga published by creators
      • Publishing tools for creators
      • Collections and personal library system
      • User messaging
      • Social and community features
terms.section3Content: To use certain features, you must register an account providing accurate and complete information. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password and all activities under your account.
terms.section4Content:
By using MangaAura, you agree to:
      • Not publish illegal, offensive, or third-party rights infringing content
      • Not harass, intimidate, or discriminate against other users
      • Not attempt unauthorized access to systems or data
      • Not use the platform for fraudulent activities
      • Respect creators' copyright
terms.section5Content: Creators retain rights to their content. By publishing on MangaAura, you grant the platform a license to display, distribute, and promote your content within the service. You may remove your content at any time.
terms.section6Content: We offer free and paid content through a virtual coin system. Purchases are final and non-refundable except in specific cases. Prices are subject to change with prior notice.
terms.section7Content: We may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms. You may also delete your account at any time from settings. Some data may be retained as required by law.
terms.section8Content: MangaAura is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We will not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from use or inability to use the service.
terms.section9Content: We may modify these terms at any time. Significant changes will be notified 30 days in advance. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.
terms.section10Content: If you have questions about these terms, contact us through the contact form or at support@mangaaura.es
terms.confirmation: By using MangaAura, you confirm that you have read, understood, and accepted these Terms of Service.
